description.ko: 이 작품은 PRISM-2의 핵심 본질을 포착하여, 빛이 미래지향적인 수정 형태를 통해 구조화된 스펙트럼으로 변하는 광학 분산의 정밀한 순간을 보여줍니다.
description.en: This piece captures the core essence of PRISM-2, illustrating the precise moment of optical dispersion where light transforms into a structured spectrum through a futuristic crystalline form.

prompt: A high-tech, minimalist PRISM-2 glass sculpture centered in a dark void. A single beam of intense white light hits the edge, refracting into a complex, multi-layered spectrum of vibrant neon colors. Sharp geometric shadows, caustic light patterns on the floor, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, translucent crystal textures.
